name: Panic Table
description: Roll when you fail a Panic Check (Fear Save). Result applies immediately and may cascade via Trauma Responses.

name: Bleeding Wounds
description: Roll when you take a Wound from a Bleeding weapon (Scalpel, Hand Welder, Rigging Gun, Vibechete, Laser Cutter).

name: Gore Wounds
description: Roll when you take a Wound from a Gore weapon (Boarding Axe, Vibechete, Laser Cutter [+]).

name: Gunshot Wounds
description: Roll when you take a Wound from a Gunshot weapon (Revolver, Pulse Rifle, SMG, Combat Shotgun, Smart Rifle, GPMG).

name: Blunt Force Wounds
description: Roll when you take a Wound from a Blunt Force weapon (Crowbar, Stun Baton, Tranq Pistol, Foam Gun, Unarmed).

name: Fire/Explosives Wounds
description: Roll when you take a Wound from a Fire/Explosives weapon (Flamethrower, Frag Grenade, Flare Gun).

name: Marine Loadout
description: Roll 1d10 during character creation to determine your Marine's starting equipment.

name: Android Loadout
description: Roll 1d10 during character creation to determine your Android's starting equipment.

name: Scientist Loadout
description: Roll 1d10 during character creation to determine your Scientist's starting equipment.

name: Teamster Loadout
description: Roll 1d10 during character creation to determine your Teamster's starting equipment.

name: Trinket Table
description: Roll d100 during character creation for a personal trinket. Flavour item; no mechanical effect unless the Warden says otherwise.

name: Ship Megadamage Status Report
description: When a ship takes a critical hit, roll here to determine which system is damaged. Results escalate in severity.

name: Random Horrors
description: Five-column d100 table. Each row gives a full TOMBS Cycle Horror: Transgression / Omens / Manifestation / Banishment / Slumber.

name: Themes
description: Roll d100 for a thematic motif to colour your scenario.

name: Random Lore
description: Roll d100 for a fragment of Mothership universe lore — a seed for rumours, backstory, or side plots.

name: Starting Scenario
description: Roll d10 for a first-session scenario hook.

name: Setting Location
description: Roll d10 for where the scenario takes place.

name: Compulsive Nightmarish Sculpture
description: Dead Planet — roll when you gain the Compulsion. Generates a description of the sculpture you are compelled to create.

name: Cryopod Occupants
description: Gradient Descent — roll d10 for each occupied cryopod in [33C] The Freezer. 50% chance each is an Infiltrator Android.

name: Pit Creatures
description: A Pound of Flesh — roll d10 to determine what creature fights in The Court's Pit.

name: Accused at The Court
description: A Pound of Flesh — roll d10 to determine who is on trial and what they can offer.

name: Patches Table
description: Roll d100 during character creation for a patch sewn on your clothing or gear.
